slides.headline: Automate VA Certifications
slides.body: Maximize student veteran success with VASCO Assistant Pro.

slides.headline: Streamline Certification
slides.body: Automate the certification process, reducing manual errors and saving time.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Maintain accurate records of student veteran enrollment and certification.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower students with real-time data and automated updates.

slides.headline: ComplianceMatters
slides.body: Stay ahead of VA requirements with automated compliance checks.

slides.headline: VAEducation
slides.body: Ensure your school is fully certified and compliant with VA regulations.

outline.caption: Maximize student veteran success with VASCO Assistant Pro. Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans. Stay ahead of VA requirements with our easy-to-use tool. Link in bio for more information.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, 'ComplianceMatters', as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw more attention.
